note: Warn-only per-job wall-clock ceilings for the public CI run (tempdoc 667). Ceilings are seeded from the measured median x ~1.25 over a 15-run sample of successful `main` runs (2026-07-01); per-lane CV was ~6-10%, so a 1.25x-median ceiling rarely false-alarms while still catching a real regression. These are ADVISORY ONLY: the CI checks themselves remain the pass/fail authority, and this budget never fails a run. Ceilings are a property of the hosted-runner environment over time, not of a release, so they are hand-set here (mirroring unit-test-shard-policy.v1.json) rather than projected from a release record. Refresh deliberately when the runner image or lane membership changes; do not chase per-run noise.

lanes.owner: app and UI hosted unit evidence
lanes.notes: Critical path in 12/15 sampled runs; median ~600s.
